message: ci: upgrade runner images and split Swift toolchain setup

files.patch:
@@ -11,20 +11,28 @@ jobs:
     name: Desktop Swift (${{ matrix.os }})
     strategy:
       matrix:
-        os: [macos-latest, ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest]
+        os: [macos-15, ubuntu-22.04, windows-2025]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Select Xcode 16
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
-        run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
+        run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.1.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
 
-      - name: Install Swift toolchain
+      - name: Install Swift toolchain (macOS/Linux)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         uses: SwiftyLab/setup-swift@v1
         with:
           swift-version: '6.2.1'
 
+      - name: Install Swift toolchain (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        uses: compnerd/gha-setup-swift@v1
+        with:
+          branch: swift-6.2-release
+          tag: 6.2-RELEASE
+
       - name: Build
         run: swift build --build-tests
 
@@ -33,7 +41,7 @@ jobs:
 
   apple-simulators:
     name: Apple Platforms (${{ matrix.platform }})
-    runs-on: macos-latest
+    runs-on: macos-15
     needs: desktop-swift
     strategy:
       matrix:
@@ -45,7 +53,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Select Xcode 16
-        run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
+        run: sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.1.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode_16.0.app || sudo xcode-select -s /Applications/Xcode.app
       - name: Build for ${{ matrix.platform }}
         run: |
           xcodebuild \
